extracted.title: Construction and Maintenance Schedule - Updated March 23, 2026
extracted.description:
As a courtesy, Northern Border Pipeline (NBPL) hereby notifies customers of the Construction and Maintenance Schedule posted under "Construction and Maintenance" on the Informational Postings website. NBPL reminds customers to please check the Maintenance Schedule on a regular basis.

Changes since last posting:
- Remove – Zeeland Station 8 MCC Replacement Outage that was originally scheduled from 4/8 – 4/17
- Add – Zeeland Station 8 Spring Outage on 4/8 – 4/9
- Date Change – Glen Ullin Station 6 Bison XP ESD Testing, now on 4/14 – 4/16 from previous dates of 4/20 – 4/22
- Date Change – Manning Station 5 Bison XP ESD Testing, now on 4/17 from previous date of 4/27

Additionally, the following file(s) can be located on Informational Postings under Construction and Maintenance:
2026 NBPL maintenance schedule 032326.pdf
